Patch attached, does that help you? 

--- Dumpvalue.pm.orig   Fri Feb  8 21:22:15 2002 
+++ Dumpvalue.pm        Fri Feb  8 21:22:29 2002 
@@ -450,7 +450,7 @@ 

Dumpvalue - provides screen dump of Perl data. 

-=head1 SYNOPSYS 
+=head1 SYNOPSIS 

use Dumpvalue; 
my $dumper = new Dumpvalue;
